title: stelis mandoniana
intro: Stelis mandoniana, also known as the 'Coralroot', is a rare orchid species found in the Andes mountains. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis mandoniana are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or decoction, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
